hints.text: Overseas collectivity of **France** (counts as France), south of Newfoundland; all coverage is a **Gen3 trekker**
Plates white or yellow, all w/ a **blue EU strip** (white ones also have a French blue strip on the right)
Houses = **boxy wooden panels in vivid, bold colours**
Flat to rolling **grassland**, the coast visible more often than not
Coverage only in E **Saint-Pierre** (capital; sidewalk trekker, bigger buildings, busier) and the N tip of **Miquelon-Langlade** (ATV shadow + vivid timber cladding)
